utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 required items in the format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all seven items. Each one is fully specified with the necessary details: destination (Athens, Greece), travel_dates (September 25–29, 2024), transportation (flight details and cost), accommodation (hotel details and cost), activities (list of three with costs), additional_services (restaurant recommendations with price ranges), and total_budget (€720). Therefore, all required fields are covered completely and appropriately.

Therefore, each item in the package is mapped to its respective ground-truth rating.
